description: Enable bcWebCam's duplicate barcode filtering (often called 'Same Barcode Delay' or 'Ignore Duplicate') and set the interval to 5 seconds (5000 milliseconds). Open bcWebCam's Options dialog (gear icon in the bottom toolbar), find the duplicate/same barcode delay setting, enable it, set the value to 5000 (ms) or 5 (seconds) as appropriate, and click OK to apply.
